message:
test(unit): expand simd_scan.rs inline tests from 22 to 31 (+9) (ft-25k5d)

Add tests for: metrics clone/copy/debug, CRLF handling, OSC sequence,
large plain text, interleaved ESC+newlines, density at 0.5, single char
logical line count, newline inside CSI params.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
